summary: Frontend-only end-to-end testing of OMGTech Pop-Up Shop landing page completed successfully. All requested flows pass: landing load, sticky nav (desktop + mobile toggle), hero (headline/subheadline/CTAs/urgency text), CTA smooth-scroll to #devices and #contact, 3 product cards (ipad / lenovo-laptop / aio-pc) with image+price+condition+quantity+Request, product 'Request' click prefills device select via prefill-device CustomEvent and scrolls contact into view, 4 process steps, 6 trust points, FAQ accordion expand/collapse (6 items), contact form required-field validation (error toast on missing name/email/device), valid submit shows success sonner toast and resets form, footer renders, mobile (375px) layout has no horizontal overflow and mobile nav menu works. All interactive elements expose data-testid attributes.

issues: All 3 products show placeholder 'Starting at $XXX' price — acceptable per spec but should be replaced with real prices before launch.
When the mobile menu is open at 375px, the 'Made with Emergent' floating badge overlays the 'Request a Device' hero CTA (third-party badge — likely not removable).

action_items: Replace placeholder 'Starting at $XXX' with real device pricing when inventory pricing is finalized.
(Optional) Consider auto-closing the mobile menu after navigation since user is scrolled to anchor but menu remains open.
critical_code_review_comments: Devices.jsx onClick also sets a data-prefill attribute on the SelectTrigger before dispatching the CustomEvent — the attribute is unused since Contact.jsx reads e.detail. Harmless but dead code, can be removed.
Contact.jsx uses a simulated 700ms setTimeout for submission — this is correct for the frontend-only build per user choice (MOCKED submission, no backend call).
Hero href='#top' on logo points to the hero section id='top' — works correctly.
Code is well structured, components are small and focused (<110 lines each), data-testid coverage is excellent across all interactive elements.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Frontend-only static landing page. Contact form submission is MOCKED (client-side setTimeout + sonner toast). Product 'Request' button uses a window-level 'prefill-device' CustomEvent picked up by Contact.jsx — verified working. REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL set but unused by the page. External preview URL: https://popup-devices.preview.emergentagent.com
